name: Yogurt Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the yogurt and baking soda. Stir until foamy.
2. In another bowl, mix together the oil, brown sugar, egg, and bran.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, and salt) to the wet mixture. Fold in the fruit.
4. Use pre-cooked fruit such as strawberries, raspberries, or peaches. The yogurt pairs well with these fruits, but you can also use other types of fruit.
5. Spoon the batter into muffin cups and bake until golden brown.
